source.title: DevOps Engineer
source.content_text:
DevOps Engineer

Interface Recruitment 
View all jobs


Melbourne VIC
Engineering - Software (Information & Communication Technology)
Contract/Temp
$800-1000/day negotiable
Posted 2h ago
•
Low application volume

How you match
Skills and credentials from the job description
DevOps

Troubleshooting

Microsoft Azure

Microsoft Azure DevOps

Scripting

Kubernetes

Linux Operating System

Terraform Configuration Management

SQL Query Language

Pipelines

Upload a current résumé to your profile to see better matches
Was this skills match accurate?


Help us match better. We match your skills and credentials based on your profile and default resumé but we might not always get it right.
Hide all⁠

Our medium size, State Government Agency have an immediate need to boost the DevOps Team. You will be a Hands-On creative and passionate about Technology and able to Develop, Troubleshoot and Support Azure Cloud Software and Releases. The Projects are mainly Development focused as such, more focused on Azure PaaS, lots of YAML Azure DevOps scripting and deep dive Troubleshooting with Development Teams.

Focus Points ...
Azure PaaS Services
Function Apps
Azure Kubernetes
Deep Dive TroubleShooting on Azure Resources

DevOps Engineer

Immediate start on a 6 month contract rate negotiable

Skills & Experience 

Microsoft Azure cloud PaaS Function Apps platforms

Microsoft Azure cloud PaaS Web Apps platforms

Troubleshooting and deep dive into Azure PaaS Linux platform

Terraform Infrastructure as Code

Microsoft Azure SQL PaaS

Microsoft Azure SQL Managed Instance

Azure DevOps Build and Release Pipelines

Automation scripting (Terraform / PowerShell) 

Azure Kubernetes Services

Docker container developments

Power BI Report

Strong verbal and written communications skills

Great owning and managing different DevOps project skills 

Nice to have

Microsoft Azure cloud IaaS

Tertiary qualifications in Computing, Information Technology and significant industry experience could be expected.

Excellent verbal and written (communication) skills are expected with this role (even if you're totally introverted).

If you have a combination of these Skills and are looking for a very stable company offering an excellent salary package, please send your résumé today (resume@interfacerecruitment.com.au), or talk to Jeremy King 03 9426 4888. If not this role, and you have other in demand and relevant skills, send us your resume and we'll see if we can find something else for you.



Employer questions
Your application will include the following questions:
How many years' experience do you have as a devops engineer?
Which of the following statements best describes your right to work in Australia?
employer_questions: How many years' experience do you have as a devops engineer?
Which of the following statements best describes your right to work in Australia?
